TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 8, Ant, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux nya maki 2008 kawas,hiya ga musa sangka' VH1's. hiya ga milkuy ru mlikuy msqun baqun nha kwara. 2006 kawas a'bagan,hiya ga U.S. of Ant cyux telibi mita kwara la. mintzyuwaw nya Ant hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1991, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors = == =
S.PHON: kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ant, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. qjanux nja maki **** kawas~…ē,ńßija …£a mus~…ēa s~…ēaŇčka Ē *ńß* Ēs~…ē. ńßija …£a milkuj ru mlikuj ms~…ēqun ő≤aqun nńßa kwara. **** kawas~…ē a Ēő≤a…£an,ńßija …£a u.s~…ē. o* ant ¶~ ®jux teliő≤i mita kwara la. mintzjuwaw nja ant ńßija …£a m ĒeŇči. t ĒariŇč s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŇči ru mqwas~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē = == =
S.FORM: kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 8, Ant, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux nya maki 2008 kawas,hiya ga musa sangka' VH1's. hiya ga milkuy ru mlikuy msqun baqun nha kwara. 2006 kawas a'bagan,hiya ga U.S. of Ant cyux telibi mita kwara la. mintzyuwaw nya Ant hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1991, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors = == =
